scripts.build:www: powershell -Command "Remove-Item www -Recurse -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; New-Item www -ItemType Directory -Force | Out-Null; $exclude=@('android','node_modules','www','.git','package.json','package-lock.json','capacitor.config.json'); Get-ChildItem . -Exclude $exclude | ForEach-Object { Copy-Item $_.FullName www\$($_.Name) -Recurse -Force }"
scripts.cap:sync: npm run build:www && npx cap copy android && npx cap update android
